query:
ALTER TABLE customers 
ADD COLUMN street VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN postalCode VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN city VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN country VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN vatId VARCHAR(50);
